source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.10|seg.1.1.1.11
distilled_thesis: Once full, the cup also wants to become empty again, making emptied readiness part of the route's cyclic dynamic.
